summary: Verified iteration 242 bug-fix: PromoDispatchSection 'Crates' -> 'Items' rename with derived per-row unit label. Backend GET /api/distributors/{id}/promo-deliveries returns unit_label on each dispatch. Frontend distributor detail (Brian) > Stock Out tab shows the Promotional Stock-Out section with the new header and proper per-row + subtotal unit labels. No regressions observed.
critical_code_review_comments: _promo_unit_label regex r'\(.*\)$' only strips a trailing parenthesised suffix. Names like 'Crate (12) Pack' or 'Crate (12)/box' would not be normalised (minor; existing seeds are unaffected).
next(iter(words)) on a set is non-deterministic ordering, but only matters when |words|==1 so it's safe here.
Aggregating items by joining 10k+ docs via $in is fine for current scale; consider an aggregation pipeline if dispatches per distributor grow large.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded DC-2606-0001..0006 challans for Brian (bb12d90e-4d33-4890-ac5f-17573c551b5c).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_242_promo_unit_label.py (3/3 pass). Frontend: distributor /distributors/<id> -> 'Stock Out' tab contains the Promotional Stock-Out (Delivery Challan) table. data-testids in use: promo-dispatches-table, promo-date-group-<key>, promo-dispatch-row-<id>, promo-unit-<id>, promo-date-subtotal-<key>, promo-status-<id>. Seeded items currently have no packaging_type_name -> they correctly render 'item'/'items' (expected, not a bug).
